data.title: OSL: Web3 payment has a "generation gap in experience" in terms of cost and other dimensions, which will force TradFi to accelerate its transformation to Web3
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News At the Future Stablecoin Summit 2025 organized by WOW Impact Group, OSL Executive Director and Head of Regulatory Affairs Gary Tiu pointed out that the competitive logic of the payment track can essentially be summarized as the "toll road theory", that is, payment channels are very similar to toll roads. Users will choose the most efficient and lowest friction route in terms of time and cost, and capital flows are also looking for regulatory compliance, fast settlement and cost-optimal channels. Therefore, stablecoin payments will gradually be widely accepted by more traditional financial institutions. Gary Tiu cited data to emphasize that the efficiency of Web3 payments is defining the future of payments, and this "generation gap in experience" will also be expected to further force traditional financial institutions to accelerate Web3 transformation.

data.title: BitMart will list Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Artificial Superintelligence Alliance (FET) at 13:00 (Eastern Time) on February 20, and the $FET/USDT trading pair will be launched.
The Artificial Superintelligence Alliance is an artificial intelligence laboratory based in Cambridge that is building the infrastructure required for autonomous software agents to perform economic work on behalf of individuals, machines, businesses, and organizations. The Artificial Superintelligence Alliance's network is based on open source technology and allows users to access AI capabilities on world-class secure data sets to perform complex coordination tasks in the modern economy.

data.title: Arc's short-term rise exceeded 0.2 USDT, and the 24H increase exceeded 40%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News GMGN market data shows that arc has risen in the short term and exceeded 0.2 USDT, currently at 0.213 USDT, with a 24H increase of 40.22%.

data.title: Microsoft unveils Majorana 1 quantum chip powered by new state of matter
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On Wednesday, Microsoft released Majorana 1, a quantum chip driven by an exotic state of matter that is neither liquid, solid nor gas, called topological superconductivity. 
The breakthrough, published in the scientific journal Nature, uses a custom material called a topological conductor to create and control Majorana particles, potentially expanding quantum computing to solve problems that were previously impossible. 
Essentially, a topological conductor is a semiconductor (a material that can conduct energy) that can also act as a superconductor, conducting electricity with minimal energy loss, usually at extremely low temperatures. Making this material requires atomic engineering precision and ultra-cold temperatures of minus 400 degrees, but Microsoft emphasizes that the complexity and expensive effort are worth it considering all the benefits. 
"With this material, we can build a whole new infrastructure for our quantum computers, the topological core, which allows us to scale to millions of qubits on a chip instead of tens or hundreds," Microsoft technical researcher Krysta Svore said in a company video.
The project is the longest-running project in Microsoft's history, starting at the beginning of this century when Bill Gates was CEO.
Under the Majorana architecture, a million-qubit quantum computer built with controllable qubits could solve problems that today's most powerful supercomputers can't. The current version of the chip contains eight topological qubits, but Microsoft says the architecture can be scaled to a million qubits on a single palm-sized chip, which would break through the current limitations of quantum computing. Microsoft plans to continue to refine the technology through research collaborations before commercializing it. (Decrypt)

data.title: DOGE survey finds US government made $149 billion in improper payments last year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to WSJ, the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) found in an investigation that the US government generated $149 billion in improper payments last year alone. This is enough to provide NASA with seven years of funding or build 15 aircraft carriers.
Medicare and Medicaid led with more than $60 billion in misused funds, followed by tax credits (more than $20 billion) and food aid (more than $10 billion). Of the $33.5 billion identified as potentially recoverable in 2024, agencies have only managed to recover $22.6 billion.

data.title: Bitcoin Developers Warn Of Vulnerability In Lightning Network Software
data.description: According to Odaily, experienced Bitcoin developer 'Calle' has issued a security alert to operators of nodes running older versions of Lightning Network Daemon (LND) 0.18.5 or LITD 0.14.1 software. The vulnerability is linked to how LND processes the description field of lightning invoices, potentially allowing hackers to remotely manipulate payment statuses and steal funds. Satoshi Labs co-founder Pavol Rusnak also highlighted this issue, urging Lightning Network users to promptly update their node software. The newly released versions, LND 0.18.5 and LITD 0.14.1, address this remote threat. It is important to note that LND 0.18.5 was only released last week, leaving many LND nodes outdated and vulnerable. As of the report's release, there are hundreds or possibly thousands of outdated LND nodes. Historically, LND has been the preferred software for most Lightning node operators.

data.title: Cryptocurrency Market Sentiment Shifts To Neutral
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Alternative.me indicates that the Cryptocurrency Fear and Greed Index has risen to 49 today, up from yesterday's score of 44, which was categorized as a 'fear' state. This change suggests that the market sentiment has shifted to a 'neutral' state.

data.title: Grok 3 Now Freely Available to All Users
data.description: According to PANews, xAI announced that Grok 3 is now available for free to all users until server capacity is reached. Users with X Premium+ and SuperGrok subscriptions will have extended access to Grok 3 and early access to advanced features such as voice mode. Elon Musk stated that Grok 3 will be free for all users for a limited time. Previously, Grok 3 was accessible to all Premium+ subscribers.

data.title: Developers discover a Lightning Network vulnerability that allows hackers to remotely steal funds through LND nodes
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Senior Bitcoin developer "Calle" issued a vulnerability alert to node operators running Lightning Network Daemon (LND) version 0.18.5 or LITD version 0.14.1 or earlier. The vulnerability is related to how LND checks the description field of lightning invoice settlements, allowing hackers to remotely manipulate their payment status and steal funds.
Satoshi Labs co-founder Pavol Rusnak also issued this warning to remind Lightning Network users to update their node software as soon as possible. The newly released node software LND 0.18.5 and LITD 0.14.1 fix this remote threat vector. It should be noted that LND 18.5 was just released last week, so many LND nodes are still outdated and vulnerable.
As of press time, the number of outdated LND nodes is in the hundreds or thousands. Historically, LND has been the preferred software for most lightning node operators. (Protos)

data.title: Reuters poll: Nearly 60% of economists surveyed predict that the Bank of Japan will raise interest rates in July
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to a Reuters survey, 59% of 39 economists predicted that the Bank of Japan will raise interest rates in July; 13% believe that it may raise interest rates in advance in May. More than 65% of economists said that the Bank of Japan will raise the key interest rate to 0.75% in the third quarter.
All 61 economists said that the Bank of Japan will keep the key interest rate unchanged at 0.50% on March 19. The Bank of Japan's terminal interest rate is expected to remain at 1.00%, consistent with the results of the November survey.
According to the median forecast, the Bank of Japan's interest rate is expected to reach 1.00% by the end of March 2026. Japan's wage growth rate in labor negotiations this year is expected to be 5.00%, compared with 4.75% in the January survey. (Jinshi)
